title: PrReview
description: Schema for forge code-review outputs (§7.1 / §10.2). Mirrors PrReview / ReviewBlocker in forge-agents/Reviews.scala. Used by both reviewer connectors via Claude --json-schema and Codex --output-schema.

blockers.description: Inline blockers tied to specific lines or files; empty when verdict=approve.

summary.description: Human-readable summary; rendered as the top-level review comment.
